creator: avatar@mmlab.cse.yzu.edu.tw
text:
Actually this card was supported by newpcm in 4-stable;
however, my original intention was to support this card in 3-stable(even
the snd device was marked as obsolete after
4-stable, it should works with it).

-- 
Regards,
